nodes.label: AI as tool for market and business perspective
nodes.label_negative: AI as limited to simple tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I use it for 'how to' questions as it relates to work. I use it to replace using calculators as it would relate to any calculations. I use it to analyze documents. I use it to seek advice regarding management situations

nodes.label: AI reliability for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: there have been times when AI has been wrong when providing something such as a calculation or reviewing a financial document

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I would say I more likely collaborate with it. I do delegate at times but since I'm involved in it and review it's accuracy, that's still somewhat collaborating with it I guess

nodes.label: AI for time-sensitive or flexible tasks
nodes.grounding_span: If it relates to anything time sensitive or that may be flexible, like the time a location closes or setting up an appointment, many times that can be searched online and AI can find that information for me but I do like to do that myself

nodes.label: AI for role-playing and preparation
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI to role play conversations with an employee. Let's say it's a challenging conversation

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: This is something that would've taken an extremely long time for me to do but it did it quickly

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability
nodes.grounding_span: double check for accuracy and to make sure I didn't overlook anything

nodes.label: Informed decision-making
nodes.grounding_span: It allows me to fully do my due diligence so I'm prepared prior to kicking off that conversation with the employee

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
nodes.grounding_span: Very satisfied when using it to search the web and gather business reviews on my small business

nodes.label: Concern about AI becoming competitor
nodes.grounding_span: It did so however missed a few competitors which was frustrating

nodes.label: Cautious trust with verification
nodes.grounding_span: I use AI for that too but sometimes, do it myself too. Same with anything financial related, I use AI but do double check

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: It was a back and forth but a good exercise to learn about where my opportunities are

nodes.label: Systematic verification through source checking
nodes.grounding_span: double check for accuracy and to make sure I didn't overlook anything when providing the information to AI
